reviews.comment:
La piel de gallo 🐓 cuando leo tantos comentarios de VAGOS que piensan que una sola estación y poco personal los van atender como en baires!!!! 🤷 impresentables Queres rapidez madrugada vago/a

I get goosebumps 🐓 when I read so many comments from LAZY people who think that a single station and few staff will serve them like in Buenos Aires!!!! 🤷 Unbelievable! You want speed in the early morning, you lazy bum!
